description: Style NoteThis summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This tunic is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make head turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest. Product DescriptionCream coloured spaghetti tunic, has a slight curved neckline, lace detail around the spaghetti straps, arm holes and below the neckline, gathers below the neckline, lace detail above, and at  the hemline and lining inside Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmTumble dry low Use warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
